title: AgentState (status-v1)
description: Per-agent state.json schema (schema v1). Derived from the Rust AgentState struct in crates/fno-agents/src/state.rs.

schema_version.description: Schema version; always 1 for this schema

status.description: Agent lifecycle status (snake_case). state.status is canonical; registry.status is a projection.

ready.description: Whether the agent is ready for input. Defaults to false.

last_message_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of last message sent to the agent, or null

last_reply.description: Last reply text from the agent, or null

restart_count.description: Number of times this agent has been restarted. Defaults to 0.

last_restart_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last restart, or null

oneOf.description: PTY sub-state. Present for PTY-managed agents; null for shellout (claude) agents.

drive_active.description: Whether an interactive drive window is currently open

drive_session_id.description: Drive window session identifier, or null when no drive is active

last_heartbeat_at_monotonic_ns.description: Monotonic-clock nanosecond baseline of the last drive heartbeat, or null

then.description: When a drive window is open, drive_session_id and drive_mode must be present and non-null. The Rust deserializer normalizes this today; the schema now encodes the co-presence invariant. (active and drive_active are unconditionally required by the base object, so they are not re-listed here.)

pty.description: PTY sub-state, or null for shellout agents
